title: iseilema schmidii
intro: Iseilema schmidii, also known as the African Rice Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help to soothe wounds and combat infections. The health benefits of Iseilema schmidii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can be crushed and applied topically to affected areas.
